findings.evidence: `GroupAlgebraProduct.lean:63` opens `namespace MonoidAlgebra` with only `[Monoid G] [Monoid H]`; `:132` defines `prodTensorAlgEquiv` and `:161` defines `prodTensorBialgEquiv`; the algebraic-group dependency is only used later at `:198-199` for `AlgHom.mapDomainMulEquiv ... .trans AffineGroup.Product.pointsMulEquiv`.
findings.fix: Move the `TauCeti.MonoidAlgebra` product tensor declarations and their private helpers to an earlier algebra/bialgebra monoid-algebra file, then have the algebraic-group file import that file for `DiagonalizableGroup.prodPointsMulEquiv`.
findings.issue: `MonoidAlgebra.prodTensorAlgEquiv` and `prodTensorBialgEquiv` are generic monoid-algebra/bialgebra API for `[Monoid G] [Monoid H]`, not algebraic-group-specific material, so placing them in `AlgebraicGroup/GroupAlgebraProduct.lean` makes broadly reusable algebra depend on the algebraic-group layer.

summary: The points consequence is in a fitting algebraic-group file, but the generic monoid-algebra bialgebra product is hidden under the algebraic-group directory instead of an earlier algebra/bialgebra home.
